'''Rin Shuuir''' was a [[Sith sorcerer]] active<ref name="TotJC" /> around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' is set 4,000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which translates to [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> At one point, he accompanied the [[Sith Warrior|Sith warrior]] [[Utris]], who became incapacitated. To revive his companion, Shuuir used a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[healing amulet]], which in turn forced the [[Sith sorcery/Legends|sorcerer]] to temporarily impair his ability to access the [[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]] class of [[Force power/Legends|Force abilities]].<ref name="TotJC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rin Shuuir was introduced in the [[1996]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', written by [[George R. Strayton]] and published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, the character was mentioned in an example describing the in-game usage of a healing [[Sith talisman/Legends|amulet]]. This article assumes that the [[in-universe]] aspects of that example are [[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="TotJC" />
